ideation: This animation sequence depicts the concept of 'not free of charge' using a robot's arm movements.  The gesture will involve a hand motion emphasizing cost or payment. Frame 1 will show both arms resting at the sides. Frame 2 will have the right arm extend forward, palm up, as if presenting something. Frame 3 will show the right arm slightly lower, as if indicating a price or cost. Frame 4 will transition back to a neutral resting pose. This sequence aims for a clear and concise visual representation of the emoji's meaning.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm extends forward, palm up, presenting
right arm lowers slightly, indicating a cost
both arms return to a resting state
